name: Colonel Rob Maness
subject: Duke calls me a coward and Dr. Carson a myth?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLONEL ROB MANESS
body:
| | [](http://www.robmaness.com/?e=48466c1f49ab3b6687506837d115c547&utm_source=robmaness&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2016726_denounc&n=1)
---
Peter -- It looks like our #DenounceDuke message got around to the coward himself. After seeing our choice words, David Duke called me a "traitor" and my friend Dr. Ben Carson a "myth". Duke is a pathetic coward trying to cling to Donald J Trump's coattails. But Trump is full of love for our country. Duke on the other hand is just a hate-filled coward who fled overseas and tried to cut deals with Iran when I was busy defending our country and destroying terrorists. **Trump will win. Duke will lose.** Love always TRUMPS hate! Pour some coffee, I've got some ideas for Duke... subject: Before August
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Please read.

Dear Friend,

Did you see Jay's message? Here at Inslee HQ, we hope you're having a great summer. But we also hope you know how important it is for Governor Inslee to finish July strong -- especially as the RGA looks for weakness ahead of the August 2 primary.

Help us meet this pre-primary deadline with a contribution today. We can't do this without your support.

CONTRIBUTE: http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTI2MDE1NQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=2&j=OTYyMTEyNjE4S0&mt=1&rt=0

Thank you,

Team Jay

---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Jay Inslee
Date: Tuesday, July 26, 2016
Subject: This month

Dear Friend,

The end of July brings us the slow, calm, relaxing days of summer. It's when I normally like to spend time with Trudi and my kids and grandkids.

But while the dog days of summer are upon us, my campaign is heating up -- and we can't afford to take our foot off the pedal between now and the primary on August 2. The election is closer with each day, and the stakes are getting higher.

- The Republican Governors Association has its eye on this race. You and I know that this group has swayed blue states before -- we can't let that happen here in Washington.

- My opponent's campaign has launched its first ads, and we know there will be more to come.

Right before the primary, we need to file another fundraising report. And while all of that's going on, our organizers across the state are executing our get-out-the-vote efforts. They're knocking on doors, calling voters, and laying the essential groundwork for the election in November.

We could use your support right now. Will you help my campaign raise another $5,000 by the official, public, pre-primary deadline?

CONTRIBUTE: http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=OTI2MDE1NQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=2&j=OTYyMTEyNjE4S0&mt=1&rt=0

Thank you so much for supporting this campaign.

Very truly yours,

Jay Inslee

name: Steve Bullock
subject: For me, it's personal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---

Friend,

As I'll keeping saying, I really don't enjoy sending fundraising emails. In fact, as Attorney General, I fought Citizens United all the way to the Supreme Court because I don't think elections should be decided by who can spend the most money.

But I'm running against a multi-millionaire self-funder -- and the Republican Governors Association as well as the Koch-backed Americans for Prosperity are pouring money into this race to try to beat me and undo Montana's progress. Right now, I'm $2,990 away from our July fundraising goal, so I'm going to need your help. **[Will you donate $20?](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=nu3rSlMAsBgELe7wO1jCe5mjhfbj7%2BRd)**

My wife Lisa and I were born here. We send our three kids to Montana public schools. Making sure every single Montanan is able to get a quality education, a good job and the opportunity to build a better life is why I'm running for reelection.

This campaign is personal to me because it's about the direction of the state for my family and yours. Big money is being spent by Greg Gianforte and his dark money out-of-state friends to radically change the course of Montana. **While asking for money is my least favorite thing to do,[I hope you'll pitch in $20 to make sure this doesn't happen.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=3nuHoE3TQLT4MJqeM5ThYZmjhfbj7%2BRd)

We have just 15 hours before our deadline tonight.**

Thanks,

Steve Bullock

name: Trey Gowdy
subject: I need your help, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Trey Gowdy for Congress
body:
Peter, Democrats have targeted me for defeat. They would love to see me lose, and will probably stop at nothing to make sure that happens. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36678990:W4XO9xY2N:m:1:1353064270:E8156F1E47137247914DD2C3C8787577:r)
---
Peter,

I'm running for re-election because I know the work in Washington is not complete.

**But in order to stay fighting for our shared values,**[I need your help**. ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36678990:W4XO9xY2N:m:1:1353064270:E8156F1E47137247914DD2C3C8787577:r)**

**When you speak truth to power, you become a target. And I have been targeted by the Democrats and the liberal media.**

My least favorite part of being a Congressman is having to ask for help. I know how hard you work for your paycheck, and I want you to know not a penny goes wasted on my campaign. I run a tight ship, monitor costs closely, and have great people helping me.

But, Peter, the reality is this: Democrats have targeted me for defeat. They would love to see me lose, and will stop at nothing to make sure that happens.

Peter, I need your support today to make sure they lose and we win. We have just over 100 days until Election Day. Your financial donation today will ensure we have the funds to fight back and WIN.

[**If I can count on you will you let me know?** [**Peter, I hope you will consider making a donation online right now. Anything will help.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36678990:W4XO9xY2N:m:1:1353064270:E8156F1E47137247914DD2C3C8787577:r)

| [** STAND WITH TREY
Donate NOW >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36678990:W4XO9xY2N:m:1:1353064270:E8156F1E47137247914DD2C3C8787577:r)
---

This campaign is not going to be easy. The Democrats in Washington are going to work around the clock to see me defeated.

**[Your donation today will ensure we have the resources to fight back and run a winning campaign.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36678990:W4XO9xY2N:m:1:1353064270:E8156F1E47137247914DD2C3C8787577:r)**

I have heard from so many likeminded conservative friends who have encouraged me in this campaign. It's wonderful and great news so many of you are ready to fight for our principles.

The massive Democrat political machine will do whatever it takes to make sure I am defeated in November. We need to run a strong campaign to fight back and your donation today will ensure that is possible.

[** SUPPORT TREY GOWDY
Donate NOW >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36678990:W4XO9xY2N:m:1:1353064270:E8156F1E47137247914DD2C3C8787577:r)
---

Thank you for your support for both my campaign and our country.

Sincerely,

Trey Gowdy
South Carolina 4th District

**P.S. I've developed a reputation for holding people accountable, and you can bet that when I win re-election I will continue to do just that. But, Peter, there are many who would love to see me leave Washington and quit holding people - our LEADERS - accountable.[I need your help right now to ensure I am able to run a winning campaign. Will you show your support and stand with me by making a donation right now?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36678990:W4XO9xY2N:m:1:1353064270:E8156F1E47137247914DD2C3C8787577:r)**

**Phil Scott Releases New “Clear Priorities” TV Ad** _Heading into the August 9 primary, Scott highlights his priorities in 30-second spot_
Middlesex, Vt., JULY 27, 2016 – Phil Scott, candidate for governor, today released a new television ad highlighting his priorities leading up to the August 9 primary election.

Scott, who throughout his campaign has outlined his priorities to strengthen the economy, make Vermont more affordable and restore faith and trust in government, explains in the ad, “trust and integrity are very important. Vermonters are yearning for that again.”

“I firmly believe that we cannot tax people any more. There isn’t that capacity,” he continues. “So we have to grow the economy. We have to build that revenue in order to ensure prosperity for Vermonters.”

Watch the full advertisement here:
| [](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4dtoQRkpEu4)
---

The 30-second “Clear Priorities” spot is the second TV ad for Scott during the Primary campaign. The first, “Example for Our Kids,” stressed his commitment to making Vermont more affordable, the economy stronger and political campaigns an example for our children.

**Listen, Learn, Lead: Meet Phil Scott**

Lieutenant Governor Phil Scott h/as been a consistent voice of reason and common sense in Montpelier. As the only Republican elected to statewide office, Phil has shown determination and leadership in advocating for Vermonters and promoting policies and programs that benefit Vermont families and the economy. Read about Phil Scott’s plans at [www.philscott.org](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=488fb76138&e=19cebfe173).

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Have some room to spare?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
| Peter \--

I worked in New Hampshire during the primary -- which means I spent my days knocking on doors, giving pep-talks to volunteers, and drinking a lot of coffee.

All the long hours were tough. That’s why I’m so thankful for the very kind family who opened their home and let me sleep in their guest room. After a long day of talking to voters all over the state, there was nothing better than knowing I had a safe place to stay -- with folks who love Hillary as much as I do.

Now that the primary is over, we’re organizing all over the country -- and many of my friends are looking for a great place to stay, just like the one I had. **[Do you have a spare room, couch, or a futon that a volunteer or staffer could use to rest?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=25&ms=MjYwODI5OTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQzOTI0MTU4S0&mt=2&rj=ODQzOTI0MTU4S0&rt=0)**

My Team Hillary host family (as I affectionately think of them) and I had an awesome time together: Some nights we would laugh as I told them stories from the campaign trail, and others they would tell me about what previous elections had been like. It’s totally up to you whether you want to bond with your volunteer, but I can promise you that no matter what, they’ll remember your kindness for years to come.

It will mean so much to staffers and volunteers to have a place to go to after a long day of working to elect Hillary. **Even if you’re not sure this is something you’d like to do, let us know you’re interested, and we’ll be in touch to answer any questions you may have:**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjYwODI5OTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQzOTI0MTU4S0&mt=2&rj=ODQzOTI0MTU4S0&rt=0)
Thanks -- and we can’t wait to hear from you,

Colin

Colin Oldenburg
Digital Team
Hillary for America

clean_body: | Peter \-- I worked in New Hampshire during the primary -- which means I spent my days knocking on doors, giving pep-talks to volunteers, and drinking a lot of coffee. All the long hours were tough. That’s why I’m so thankful for the very kind family who opened their home and let me sleep in their guest room. After a long day of talking to voters all over the state, there was nothing better than knowing I had a safe place to stay -- with folks who love Hillary as much as I do. Now that the primary is over, we’re organizing all over the country -- and many of my friends are looking for a great place to stay, just like the one I had. My Team Hillary host family (as I affectionately think of them) and I had an awesome time together: Some nights we would laugh as I told them stories from the campaign trail, and others they would tell me about what previous elections had been like. It’s totally up to you whether you want to bond with your volunteer, but I can promise you that no matter what, they’ll remember your kindness for years to come. It will mean so much to staffers and volunteers to have a place to go to after a long day of working to elect Hillary. Even if you’re not sure this is something you’d like to do, let us know you’re interested, and we’ll be in touch to answer any questions you may have: Thanks -- and we can’t wait to hear from you, Colin Colin Oldenburg Digital Team Hillary for America | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.5 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House). subject: Get out in Manassas tomorrow!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
| Peter --

The Office Opening in Manassas is coming up! We can’t wait for you to join fellow Democrats in your community as we come together to help Hillary and other Democrats win.

**Here are the details:**
**WHAT:** Democratic National Convention Watch Party in Manassas
**WHEN:** Thursday, July 28th
07:00 pm - 10:00 pm
**WHERE:** 9350 Main St
Manassas, Virginia 20110

**[Yes, I'll be there!](https://www.hillaryclinton.com/events/view/AHPSNOC7YDVHYNGV/?utm_source=sp&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20160727event_automation&utm_content=26044765-\(A\) - Message 2 - 1 Day Out_20160721 \(1\)&utm_term=event\(1\))**

**[I can't make it, but keep me in the loop!*](https://www.hillaryclinton.com/forms/texts-from-hillary/?utm_source=sp&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20160727event_automation&utm_content=26044765-\(A\) - Message 2 - 1 Day Out_20160721 \(1\)&utm_term=text\(1\)) **

name: TEAM COLE
subject: Justice's Questionable Actions
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLE
body:
| |
---
| Friend --

Bill Cole strongly backs Donald Trump for President because he wants to end the War on Coal and put our coal miners back to work. Jim Justice backs Hillary Clinton despite her plan to "put a lot of coal miners... out of business." He just doesn't really want anyone to know it.

When we [launched ](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3D_hEsnoxhbPY&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=justice_payplay&n=1)a TV ad, the Jim Justice campaign tried to [fool](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fjusticeforwv.com%2Fbill-cole-caught-lying-in-new-tv-ad%2F&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=justice_payplay&n=2) you into believing that he really didn't contribute to Debbie Wasserman Schultz at the Democratic National Committee in 2011 when they were raising money for President Barack Obama's reelection campaign. They were so [desperate](http://www.billcolewv.com/justice_backs_clinton_thinks_the_rules_don_t_apply_to_him?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=justice_payplay&n=3) they even admitted to a violation of federal law. Justice's claim that he earmarked his more than $60,000 to the Kentucky Governor's race is an illegal act. If you could [pitch in](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=justice_payplay&n=4) even $5 now to help keep the TV ad on the air it would be appreciated.

Even worse, Jim Justice was so desperate to hide his financial support of President Barack Obama he cited a newspaper story that [exposed](http://www.billcolewv.com/justice_pay_to_play_politics?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=justice_payplay&n=5) his _pay to play political scheme_ in Kentucky. The facts are clear: Jim Justice contributed to President Obama's reelection campaign and he backs Hillary Clinton for President. This shouldn't surprise you since in March 2015 he willingly joined her party. Jim Justice not only supports Hillary Clinton, he shares her politics. He thinks the rules don't apply to him and engages in old style, _pay to play politics._

While Jim Justice wants to avoid telling voters why he supports Hillary Clinton and talk about his plans to move West Virginia forward, Bill Cole is on the campaign trail [talking](http://www.billcolewv.com/nfib_endorses_cole_for_governor?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=justice_payplay&n=6) about his plans to [create](http://www.billcolewv.com/cole_outlines_manufacturing_strategy?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=justice_payplay&n=7) good paying jobs. To [help out](http://www.billcolewv.com/volunteer?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=justice_payplay&n=8) on the campaign trail please sign up today.

**TEAM COLE**

[http://www.billcolewv.com/](http://www.billcolewv.com/?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=justice_payplay&n=9)

name: Marco Rubio
subject: catastrophic...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate 2016
body:
If Republicans lose control of the Senate it would be catastrophic for our nation. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36684500:WWp8LFYfN:m:1:1328517760:2BDF10194101503FBC6CB2669445EAD2:r)
---
Friend - We can't lose.

**_If Republicans lose control of the Senate it would be catastrophic for our nation, and it all hangs on what happens here in Florida this November_.** If my Democratic opponent were to defeat me, it would mean a Senate stacked with liberal democrats like Elizabeth Warren, Cory Booker, Al Franken, _and my opponent_.

**_Can you imagine the damage they could and would do to our nation if they gained control?_**

I need your immediate support to make certain he doesn't defeat me this fall. Since announcing my campaign just one month ago, I've seen a lot of support but I'm at a disadvantage. My opponent has been running his campaign for over a year and raising money for just as long. **[But with your support today, we can overcome a late start to this race.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36684500:WWp8LFYfN:m:1:1328517760:2BDF10194101503FBC6CB2669445EAD2:r)**

My opponents have had months to campaign and fundraise for this race: **I've had a little over a month.** And with our primary election in August, we have to play catch-up.

In just 5 days, we will face our last end of month deadline before our August primary election. With the primary coupled with early voting starting soon, there is no time waste. **[Can I count on your support before the end of July- $25 or even $250 before Sunday night?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36684500:WWp8LFYfN:m:1:1328517760:2BDF10194101503FBC6CB2669445EAD2:r)**

The fight to keep the Republican Majority in the United States Senate rests on the backs of Florida voters. I know this is a big responsibility. When I made the decision to run for re-election, I didn't make it lightly and I knew we would face an uphill battle. _But, Friend, the important things in life are hardly easily won..._

**[Now is our time to show the strength of our campaign, but I need you to continue to build the momentum here.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36684500:WWp8LFYfN:m:1:1328517760:2BDF10194101503FBC6CB2669445EAD2:r)**

Just 36 days ago, I announced that I was running for re-election. In little over a month, Team Marco has built the momentum not only to win the primary election in August, but also to win in November and keep the Senate Majority in the hands of conservatives.

Friend, I need your support once again before July 2016 comes to a close. **[Will you chip in $25, $50, $100, $250 or more before midnight this Sunday?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36684500:WWp8LFYfN:m:1:1328517760:2BDF10194101503FBC6CB2669445EAD2:r)**

Thanks,

Marco Rubio

P.S. I am running for re-election because there is still more work to do in the Senate, but if we lose the majority, I cannot finish that work. August will be one of the most critical months in my re-election campaign and I need to make sure we continue to build the momentum needed to win. **[Friend, will you be part of continuing the momentum to victories in August and November?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36684500:WWp8LFYfN:m:1:1328517760:2BDF10194101503FBC6CB2669445EAD2:r)**

| [** DONATE TODAY **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36684500:WWp8LFYfN:m:1:1328517760:2BDF10194101503FBC6CB2669445EAD2:r)
---

| Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate 2016

name: Team Bullock
subject: Fwd: For me, it's personal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---

Friend,

With 4 hours to go until our July financial deadline, please take a moment to read Steve's note below.

Our fundraising numbers will go public in 5 days. While thousands of Montanans have already stepped up, we can't afford to have a single supporter sit this one out -- especially since press, pundits and Greg Gianforte's cronies will scrutinize our financial report to judge the strength of our grassroots energy. We'll also be making critical campaign decisions (like ad buys) based on whether we hit our goal.

**We 're just $1,090 short. [Make sure we don't fall behind. Chip in $15.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=03oRhbCqIOap%2BVhtqGS1nMw0NBkqPG26)**

Thanks,

Team Bullock

_\---Original Message---
Sender_: Steve Bullock
_Subject Line_ : For me, it's personal

Friend,

As I'll keeping saying, I really don't enjoy sending fundraising emails. In fact, as Attorney General, I fought Citizens United all the way to the Supreme Court because I don't think elections should be decided by who can spend the most money.

But I'm running against a multi-millionaire self-funder -- and the Republican Governors Association as well as the Koch-backed Americans for Prosperity are pouring money into this race to try to beat me and undo Montana's progress. Right now, I'm $2,990 away from our July fundraising goal, so I'm going to need your help. **[Will you donate $20?](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=INBou9xzKvTC%2B3lS6OLYTsw0NBkqPG26)**

My wife Lisa and I were born here. We send our three kids to Montana public schools. Making sure every single Montanan is able to get a quality education, a good job and the opportunity to build a better life is why I'm running for reelection.

This campaign is personal to me because it's about the direction of the state for my family and yours. Big money is being spent by Greg Gianforte and his dark money out-of-state friends to radically change the course of Montana. **While asking for money is my least favorite thing to do,[I hope you'll pitch in $20 to make sure this doesn't happen.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=TYMmJyB%2FzsRCWSy2ImXcrsw0NBkqPG26)

We have just 15 hours before our deadline tonight.**

Thanks,

Steve Bullock
---
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=FJpxYnq%2FhC588IQ%2FJhxU2cw0NBkqPG26)

---

Friends of Steve Bullock

Helena MT 59624 United States
